acceptanceReviewed.criterion: Add a deterministic shell checker for .github/dependabot.yml.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: scripts/dependabot-contract-check.sh uses Bash, awk, and grep only; no new dependencies were added.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: Require weekly github-actions and cargo update entries rooted at /.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: The checker counts update entries only when ecosystem, directory, and interval match the required values in the same entry.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: Wire the check into just check through a dedicated just target.
Record evidence and reports under the node-owned paths.
Run required verification and note macOS validation is not required.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: evidence/m4-dependabot-contract-check/commands.log records verification commands; reports record realWorldValidation.status as not_required.

realWorldValidation.evidence: This node validates repository Dependabot metadata only; macOS validation is not required.
